title: JRose Collections Wooden Nagchampa Incense Joss Stick Cone Holder Smoke Box Made by Rosewood with 10 Satya Incense Sticks
features: Satya Nagchampa Incense Sticks Cone Holder with 10 Nagchampa Incense sticks
The dimensions of the holder are Length - 30 cm Width - 5 cm Height - 6.3 cm
Place your incense cones or dhoop on the two brass pots or light up your incense sticks and put them into the holes on both sides, you can burn them all together and create your personnel aroma
ECO FRIENDLY CHOICE: Wood is incredibly durable, water resistant and a sustainable choice. Incense Stick Holder is made from premium wood with minimal wastage at every step of production.
